name: studio
description: Project-management overlay for long-running Claude Code sessions. Advisory orchestration that picks up project state automatically (CHANGELOG, BACKLOG, HANDOFF docs, git, artefacts) and proposes next actions. Plus handoff docs, CHANGELOG continuity, rollback-as-release, user-judged A/B comparisons, structured investigation branches. Domain-agnostic — composes with any of the *-freedom plugins (audio, marketing, figma, webapp, cli, hardware) for full multi-domain workflows. Renamed from session-discipline v0.1.1 (same skills, clearer naming).
